features: CLEAN & FRESH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with vanilla sugar oil in a resealable bag for easy storage.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath before bedtime will soothe and relax. The fresh vanilla fragrance will help aid a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with vanilla essential oil in a resealable bag for easy storage. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Ready to use, fragranced with vanilla sugar oil in a resealable bag 450g. Directions Add 1-2 cups of Elysium Spa Vanilla Epsom Bath Salts to a warm bath or foot soak, mix well, and enjoy the soothing and relaxing benefits. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Not for ingestion. See more
